name: Three-Bean Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 medium bell peppers, seeded and chopped (red, orange, yellow)
1 3/4 cups cooked or canned kidney beans, (rinsed if canned)
1 3/4 cups cooked or canned black beans, (rinsed if canned)
1 3/4 cups cooked or canned white beans, (rinsed if canned)
Water or tomato juice as needed
1/2 cup chopped fresh cilantro or parsley
Salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add crushed red pepper flakes, coriander seeds, and cumin; cook, stirring often, until seasonings darken slightly.
3. Add peppers, fennel, oregano, and chili powder; cook, stirring often, until vegetables begin to soften, about 5 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and all beans; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
6. Add water or tomato juice as needed if too much liquid evaporates.
7. Stir in cilantro or parsley and season with salt and pepper.
Serve in shallow bowl, garnished with shredded cheese or yogurt if desired.
